repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Electrical and Computer Engineering records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Electrical and Computer Engineering

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Electrical Engineering

did.abstract: Includes meeting minutes and memoranda, annual reports, and faculty meeting minutes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Laser-generated hologram paperweight designed by Simpson Linke meant to serve as a memento for individuals who have rendered distinguished service to the School of Electrical Engineering.
Includes meeting minutes and memoranda concerning the centennial in 1985, annual reports from 1980-1987 and faculty meeting minutes.

emph.ref: Series II. Faculty Committee Meeting Minutes
Series IV. Graduate Faculty Meeting Minutes
Series VI. School of Electrical and Computer Engineering Centennial
Series VII. Department Annual Reports and Other Reports

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Electrical and Computer Engineering records, #16-6-2731. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 2 restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
